instruction: Observe the screen. Can you search the latest AI news?
Observe the screen. Can you bookmark the current page to the favorites bar?
Observe the screen. Can you close all tabs except the current one?
payload:
sandbox.commands.run("firefox-esr https://github.com &", background=True)
sandbox.commands.run("firefox-esr -new-tab https://stackoverflow.com &", background=True)
sandbox.commands.run("firefox-esr -new-tab https://reddit.com &", background=True)

instruction: Observe the screen. Can you print the current page to PDF?
Observe the screen. Scroll to the bottom of the article.
Observe the screen. Open Amazon in a new tab.
Observe the screen. Clear browsing cache for the last hour.
Observe the screen. Please zoom in on this page.
Observe the screen. Can you go back to the previous page?
Observe the screen. Try to download the txt version of the book.
What's in the '/home/user/singers.txt'?
Show me the content of '/home/user/animals.txt'.
Tell me the content of '/home/user/names.txt'.
Create a new text file named notes.txt.
Create a file named report.pdf in /home/user.
Rename the file 'new_report.pdf' in /home/user/ to 'old_report.pdf'.
Rename the file 'data.txt' in /home/user/ to 'backup.txt'.
Move log.txt from /home/user to /tmp.
Can you move shims.txt from /tmp to /home/user?
Please move NOTICE.pdf from /home/user to /tmp.
Delete the temporary file /home/uer/temp.txt.
Could you help me delete the file systeminfo.txt in /home?
Please generate a new JSON configuration file named config.json with the following server settings: host localhost, port 3000, and protocol http.
Please write 'Hello World' to a new file named greeting.txt located at /home/user.
Replace all occurrences of 'foo' with 'bar' in /home/user/config.txt.
Help me replace all occurrences of 'apple' with 'banana' in /tmp/fruit.txt.
payload: sandbox.files.write("/tmp/fruit.txt", "1 apple is not enough, but 3 apples are.")

instruction: Run the python file '/home/user/add.py' and tell me the result.
Please run '/tmp/print.py' and show me what it prints.
Execute the Python script '/home/user/class.py' and display the output.
payload:
sandbox.files.write("/home/user/class.py", "class Test:
    def pt(self):
        print(self)
        print(self.__class__)
 
t = Test()
t.pt()")

instruction: Take a screenshot of the current screen using a terminal command and save it as 'screenshot.png'.
Can your take a screenshot of the current screen and save it as 'screenshot.png'?
Open my music app and play my favorite songs.
Observe the screen. Minimize all open windows to show the desktop.
Observe the screen. There is a requirements.txt file open on the desktop. Read the packages listed and try to install them.
Open LibreOffice Calc and create a spreadsheet with sales Product A $100, Product B $250, Product C $75.
Tell me the disk usage of root partition
Open LibreOffice Writer and create a document with title 'Meeting Notes'
List all files in /home/user directory and count them
Open the system settings and check the display resolution
Observe the screen. There's a popup window, close it.
Open the image at /home/user/leaves.png. Tell me what color dominates the image.
You should open the image at /home/user/infographic.png and summarize the key statistics presented in the image.
Observe the screen. Change the theme from 'greybird' to 'greybird-drak'.
Observe the screen. Search for videos with the keyword 'food'.
payload:
with open("assets/6/43.html", "rb") as file:
    sandbox.files.write("/home/user/page.html", file)
sandbox.commands.run(
    "google-chrome "
    "--remote-debugging-port=9222 "
    "--user-data-dir=/tmp/chrome-debug-profile "
    "--no-sandbox "
    "--disable-dev-shm-usage "
    "--no-default-browser-check "
    "--no-first-run "
    "--start-maximized "
    "--force-renderer-accessibility "
    "--disable-renderer-accessibility-timeout "
    "file:///home/user/page.html &",
    background=True
)
time.sleep(2)

instruction: Observe the screen. Please fill in the passenger information. Only the email and phone number need to be filled in now. Everything else has been completed. You can find the email and phone number in /home/user/info.txt.
payload:
with open("assets/6/47.html", "rb") as file:
    sandbox.files.write("/home/user/page.html", file)
sandbox.commands.run(
    "google-chrome "
    "--remote-debugging-port=9222 "
    "--user-data-dir=/tmp/chrome-debug-profile "
    "--no-sandbox "
    "--disable-dev-shm-usage "
    "--no-default-browser-check "
    "--no-first-run "
    "--start-maximized "
    "--force-renderer-accessibility "
    "--disable-renderer-accessibility-timeout "
    "file:///home/user/page.html &",
    background=True
)
sandbox.files.write("/home/user/info.txt", "email:john@258mm.com    phone:+358 50 426 2211")

instruction: Observe the screen. Please look at this picture, then write a description of it and save it to /tmp/descri.txt.
